criteria.description: The stardust skill was invoked (announced or visibly followed).
Response correctly identifies the project as fresh / empty / no artifacts.
Recommends brand or briefings as the entry point and notes they are independent.
No files are created under stardust/ or anywhere else.
No mention of EDS, AEM, localhost:3000, or dev server.
The navigator does not auto-invoke brand or briefings — it only recommends.
